mapper.update: UPDATE T_BUS_RESERVATION_SIGN SET STATUS = '2' WHERE TASK_NO = #{taskNo}
mapper.select:
SELECT ID, RESERVATION_ID, APPROVE_BY, APPROVE_BY_NAME, APPROVE_TIME, CREATE_TIME, STATUS FROM T_BUS_RESERVATION_SIGN
id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_BUS_RESERVATION_SIGN SET STATUS = #{status}, APPROVE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, APPROVE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPROVE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}

UPDATE T_BUS_RESERVATION_SIGN SET STATUS = #{status}, APPROVE_BY = #{loginUserId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, APPROVE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, APPROVE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
